about.title: About
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.description: Founded on the belief that fashion should be both luxurious and accessible, JANES bridges heritage craftsmanship with modern sensibility.
about.storyParagraph1: JANES was born from a desire to create fashion that speaks to the modern individual — pieces that are as comfortable as they are striking, as timeless as they are contemporary.
about.storyParagraph2: Every piece begins with the finest raw fabrics, sourced from artisan millers across West Africa and Europe. Our atelier transforms these materials into garments that honour traditional craftsmanship while embracing modern silhouettes.
about.storyParagraph3: We believe in slow fashion — creating fewer, better pieces that last. Each collection is a carefully curated edit, designed to work together and build upon previous seasons.
about.craftsmanshipDesc: Every stitch, every seam, every button is placed with intention. Our garments are constructed to be worn, loved, and passed on.
about.sustainabilityDesc: From ethically sourced fabrics to responsible production practices, we are committed to fashion that respects both people and planet.
about.timelessnessDesc: We design beyond trends. Our pieces are meant to be worn season after season, evolving with you rather than becoming obsolete.
about.designerQuote: I design for the woman and man who sees clothing as an extension of their identity — not a costume, but a quiet declaration of self.
about.metaDescription: Our story, values, and the vision behind JANES fashion.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Client Care
faq.description: Everything you need to know about your JANES experience.
faq.q1: How do I determine my size?
faq.a1: We provide detailed size charts on each product page. Our sizing runs true to standard UK/EU measurements. For the best fit, we recommend taking your measurements and comparing them with our size guide. If you're between sizes, we generally suggest sizing up for a more relaxed fit.
faq.a2: We source our fabrics from artisan mills across West Africa and Europe. Our collections feature premium cotton, silk, linen, and our signature handwoven aso-oke fabric. Each material is selected for its quality, drape, and longevity.
faq.a3: Yes, we ship worldwide. Domestic orders within Nigeria typically arrive within 3–5 business days. International shipping takes 7–14 business days depending on destination. Express shipping options are available at checkout.
faq.a4: We accept returns within 14 days of delivery for unworn items in their original condition with all tags attached. Sale items are final sale. To initiate a return, please contact our team at returns@janes.com.
faq.a5: Yes, we work with select boutiques and retailers. For wholesale inquiries, please contact us at wholesale@janes.com with your store details and we'll be happy to discuss partnership opportunities.
faq.q6: How should I care for my garments?
faq.a6: Each garment comes with specific care instructions on the label. Generally, we recommend hand washing or dry cleaning for best results. Store garments hung or neatly folded in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight.
faq.a7: Our Lagos showroom is open Monday through Saturday, 10am to 7pm WAT. Walk-ins are welcome, though we recommend booking an appointment for a personalised styling experience. Contact us to schedule your visit.
faq.q8: Do you have a loyalty programme?
faq.a8: We're developing an exclusive membership programme that will offer early access to collections, private events, and personalised styling services. Join our newsletter to be the first to know when it launches.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.subtitle: Legal
privacy.s1p1: When you visit JANES, we collect certain information to improve your shopping experience and process your orders. This includes information you provide directly and data collected automatically through cookies and similar technologies.
privacy.s1p2: Personal information we collect includes: name, email address, shipping address, phone number, and payment information. We collect this information when you create an account, place an order, sign up for our newsletter, or contact us.
privacy.s2i1: To fulfill orders and process transactions
privacy.s2i2: To communicate with you about your order
privacy.s2i3: To send marketing communications (with your consent)
privacy.s2i4: To improve our website and services
privacy.s3p: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your browsing experience, analyse site traffic, and personalise content. You can manage cookie preferences through your browser settings.
privacy.s4p: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorised access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. Payment information is processed securely through our payment partners and is never stored on our servers.
privacy.s5p: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. You may also object to or restrict processing of your data. To exercise these rights, please contact us at privacy@janes.com.
privacy.s6p: For questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your data, please contact us at privacy@janes.com.

terms.title: Terms of
terms.subtitle: Legal
terms.s1p1: By accessing and placing an order with JANES, you confirm that you are in agreement with and bound by these terms and conditions. These terms apply to all visitors, users, and customers of the website.
terms.s1p2: We reserve the right to refuse service to anyone for any reason at any time. Prices for our products are subject to change without notice.
terms.s2p1: We have made every effort to display colours and images of our products as accurately as possible. However, we cannot guarantee that your display will accurately reflect the actual colour of the product.
terms.s2p2: We reserve the right to limit the quantities of any products or services that we offer. All orders are subject to product availability. We may, in our sole discretion, cancel any order.
terms.s3p: All payments are processed securely through our payment partners. We accept card payments via Paystack and direct bank transfers. Full payment is required before order dispatch.
terms.s4p: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, images, and software, is the property of JANES and is protected by applicable copyright and intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our prior written consent.
terms.s5p: JANES shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from your use of or inability to use the service.
terms.s6p: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Federal Republic of Nigeria. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Lagos State.
terms.s7p: Questions about the Terms of Service should be sent to us at legal@janes.com.

shipping.title: Shipping &
shipping.subtitle: Delivery Information
shipping.description: All you need to know about getting your JANES pieces to your door.
shipping.shippingIntro: We offer worldwide delivery on all orders. Shipping costs and estimated delivery times vary by destination.
shipping.shippingNote: Orders over $500 qualify for complimentary express shipping. For orders under this amount, shipping is calculated at checkout based on destination and weight.
shipping.returnsIntro: We want you to be delighted with your purchase. If for any reason you're not completely satisfied, you may return eligible items within 14 days of delivery.
shipping.returnCondition1: Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in original condition
shipping.returnCondition2: All original tags must be attached
shipping.returnCondition3: Items must be returned in original packaging
shipping.returnCondition4: Sale items are final sale and cannot be returned
shipping.returnCondition5: Raw fabric rolls cannot be returned once cut
shipping.returnProcess: To initiate a return, please contact us at returns@janes.com with your order reference number. We will provide you with a return shipping label and instructions.
shipping.refundTimeline: Refunds are processed within 5-7 business days of receiving your return. The refund will be credited to your original payment method.
shipping.exchangesIntro: We are happy to exchange items for a different size or colour, subject to availability.
shipping.exchangesTip: For the fastest service, we recommend placing a new order for the desired item and returning the original. This ensures you receive your new piece without waiting for the exchange to be processed.
